mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, place_name, place_address, lat, lng, memo, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{placeName}, #{placeAddress}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{memo}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, place_name, place_address, lat, lng, memo, created_at FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
